title: SSUHS CEE Admit Card 2026 Will Be Released Today

detail.title: SSUHS CEE Admit Card 2026 Will Be Released Today
detail.short_info: SSUHS CEE Admit Card 2026 will be released today for the BSc Nursing, Pharmacy and Allied Health entrance exam scheduled on 7 June 2026. Download the SSUHS CEE hall ticket from the official portal using application number and password and check exam centre, timing and key instructions here.

sections.heading: SSUHS CEE Admit Card 2026 Will Be Released Today

content.text: Srimanta Sankaradeva University of Health Sciences (SSUHS), Assam will release the SSUHS CEE Admit Card 2026 today for the Common Entrance Examination (CEE) 2026. The exam is conducted for admission to BSc Nursing and Allied & Healthcare (BSc Medical Technology) courses in government and private institutes across Assam.

According to the official CEE 2026 schedule, the SSUHS CEE 2026 exam will be held on 7 June 2026 at multiple centres across the state. As per the notification, admit cards will be available for download from 20 May 2026, and candidates who have successfully submitted their online applications can log in to the SSUHS CEE portal to download the hall ticket once the link is active today.
Download Here: SSUHS CEE Admit Card 2026 (Out Today)

sections.heading: SSUHS CEE Admit Card 2026 – Key Details

rows: Srimanta Sankaradeva University of Health Sciences (SSUHS), Assam
BSc Nursing, D.Pharm, B.Pharm, Allied & Healthcare (BSc Medical Technology)
Application Number and Password or Date of Birth as generated during online registration

sections.heading: How to Download SSUHS CEE Admit Card 2026 (Once Released)

content.text: When the admit card link is activated today, candidates can download the SSUHS CEE hall ticket 2026 as follows:

items: Visit the SSUHS CEE portal ssuhs.formsrec.in or open the admit card link from the SSUHS website/notice section.
On the homepage, look for the link “CEE 2026 Admit Card / Download Hall Ticket” and click it.
Enter your Application Number and Password/Date of Birth in the specified fields and enter the security code if shown.
Click on Login / Submit to access your candidate dashboard.
Click on the “Download Admit Card / Hall Ticket” button for CEE 2026; your SSUHS CEE Admit Card 2026 will be displayed with exam date, time and centre details.
Verify the information carefully and download and print 2–3 clear A4‑size copies of the admit card.

content.text: The admit card will not be sent by post; it has to be downloaded online only.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on SSUHS CEE Admit Card 2026

content.text: The SSUHS CEE Admit Card 2026 will contain important exam and candidate details which must be checked thoroughly:

items: Candidate’s name and photograph
Application number / roll number
Exam name: SSUHS CEE 2026
Course applied for (BSc Nursing / D.Pharm / B.Pharm / Allied & Healthcare)
Exam date and time (7 June 2026, with reporting time)
Exam centre name, centre code, city and full address
Category and other basic details (if printed)
Instructions and exam‑day guidelines

content.text: If there is any discrepancy in your name, course, category or exam centre details, you should contact SSUHS or the helpline numbers mentioned in the CEE notification immediately before the exam.

sections.heading: Documents Required with SSUHS CEE Admit Card 2026

content.text: On the day of the SSUHS CEE 2026 exam, candidates must carry:

items: A printed copy of the SSUHS CEE Admit Card 2026 (clear A4‑size printout; colour or good‑quality black and white).
One original valid photo ID proof, such as Aadhaar Card, PAN Card, Voter ID, Driving Licence, Passport or any other government‑issued ID as per SSUHS instructions.
Any additional documents mentioned in the admit card/notification (for example, PwD certificate for candidates claiming reservation under PwD category).

content.text: Without the admit card printout and valid photo ID, entry to the examination hall will not be allowed.
To ensure smooth conduct of the SSUHS CEE 2026 examination, candidates should follow these guidelines:

items: Reach the exam centre well before the reporting time mentioned on the admit card to complete verification and seating; late entry after gate‑closing time may not be permitted.
Carry only essential items: SSUHS CEE admit card 2026, valid photo ID and basic permitted stationery (pens, pencils, etc.) as per exam instructions.

Do not carry mobile phones, smart watches, calculators (unless allowed), Bluetooth devices, earphones, written notes, books or any other electronic gadgets or paper material inside the exam hall; violation may lead to cancellation of the paper and further action.

Follow all instructions printed on the admit card and those announced by the invigilators; indulging in unfair means or disobeying exam rules can result in disqualification from SSUHS CEE 2026 and future examinations.
Preserve your SSUHS CEE Admit Card 2026 until the completion of counselling and admission, as it may be required for verification and reference.
